title: Exact Finite Algebra Homomorphism Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite homomorphism preservation and bad-map QF_UF/Alethe regression seeds
solver_reuse.pressure: Homomorphism-preservation congruence conflict, plus a concrete bad map where finite table replay computes phi(1+1)=1 and phi(1)+phi(1)=0.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional finite homomorphism rows only when they add distinct equality, concrete bad-map, quotient-map, or kernel/image solver pressure; keep general isomorphism theorems and categorical universal properties in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode finite homomorphism tables as deterministic finite-function and equality obligations.
Replay kernel, image, quotient, and induced-map witnesses through Axeyum model evaluation rather than pack-local Python only.
Keep the promoted QF_UF/Alethe rows tied to both abstract preservation and concrete bad-map source artifacts.
Continue adding emitted EUF/Alethe or finite-table certificates for quotient, kernel/image, and bad-homomorphism rows only when those concrete encodings add distinct equality/congruence pressure.
Keep general isomorphism theorems, module homomorphisms, categorical universal properties, and infinite algebra under Lean horizon until formal routes exist.
